# Gappsy

> Gappsy is a directory of business and marketing software tools, with independent, DB-verified comparison pages covering pricing, features, and head-to-head verdicts to help buyers pick the right tool.

> All facts on tool and comparison pages (pricing, ratings, platform support, feature availability) are sourced directly from Gappsy's own database, not inferred.

## Categories

- [Everhour](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/everhour/): Time tracking software that plugs into Asana, Trello, Jira, and more for billing, budgets, and invoicing.

- [Evernote](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/evernote/): Evernote is a cross-platform note-taking app for capturing, organizing, and finding notes, web clips, scans, and meeting notes, now with built-in AI.
- [EverShop](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/evershop/): Open-source TypeScript e-commerce platform built on Node.js, React, and GraphQL for developers who want full control over their store.
- [Everstage](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/everstage/): Everstage automates sales commission tracking, planning, and CPQ for revenue operations and finance teams.
- [EverWebinar](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/everwebinar/): EverWebinar is automated, evergreen webinar software that replays pre-recorded presentations on a set schedule.
- [Evidence](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/evidence/): Evidence is an open source, code-first BI framework that builds interactive data products and reports using SQL and Markdown.
- [Evidently](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/evidently/): Open-source (Apache 2.0) framework for evaluating, testing, and monitoring LLMs, RAG apps, AI agents, and ML models.
- [Evisort](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/evisort/): Evisort's AI contract technology was acquired by Workday in 2024 and now powers Workday Contract Lifecycle Management, branded "powered by Evisort AI."
- [Excalidraw](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/excalidraw/): Excalidraw is a free, open-source virtual whiteboard for hand-drawn style diagrams and wireframes with real-time collaboration.
- [Exim](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/exim/): Exim is a free, highly configurable open-source mail transfer agent for routing and delivering email on Unix systems.
- [Expensify](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/expensify/): Expensify handles receipt scanning, expense reports, corporate cards, travel booking, and bill pay for individuals, freelancers, and businesses.
- [ExpressVPN](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/expressvpn/): ExpressVPN is a paid consumer VPN offering fast encrypted connections, broad device support, and an independently audited no-logs policy.
- [F-Droid](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/f-droid/): Community-run, free and open-source app catalog offering FOSS Android apps outside the Google Play Store.
- [Factorial](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/factorial/): All-in-one HR platform for SMBs covering time tracking, payroll, PTO, performance, and recruiting, built in Barcelona.
- [Falco](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/falco/): Falco is a CNCF-graduated, open-source runtime security tool that detects abnormal behavior across hosts, containers, Kubernetes, and cloud services.
- [Faraday](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/faraday/): Offensive security platform combining vulnerability management, pentest reporting, and attack surface management, with a free open-source community edition.
- [FastSpring](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/fastspring/): FastSpring is a merchant-of-record platform for selling software, SaaS, and digital products globally with automated tax compliance.
- [Fathom Analytics](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/fathom-analytics/): Fathom Analytics offers simple, privacy-first website analytics with no cookie banners and permanent data retention.
- [Faved](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/faved/): Open-source, self-hosted bookmark manager with nested tags, instant search, and easy browser import.
- [Feast](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/feast/): Open-source feature store that serves consistent structured data for ML training and real-time inference, including vector search for RAG.
- [FeatBit](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/featbit/): FeatBit is an open-source feature flag and experimentation platform that self-hosts via Docker Compose, Kubernetes, or AWS.
- [Feathery](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/feathery/): Feathery is a forms and workflow automation platform for financial services firms, combining forms, e-signatures, document intelligence, and an AI assistant.
- [Featurebase](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/featurebase/): Featurebase combines an omnichannel support inbox, AI support agent, and feedback/roadmap tools, with a free plan.
- [Fedora Commons Repository](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/fedora-commons-repository/): Modular, open-source repository system for managing and disseminating digital content in libraries, archives, and cultural institutions.
- [FeedHive](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/feedhive/): AI-powered social media platform for generating, scheduling, and automating content publishing across 11+ channels.
- [Feeds Fun](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/feeds-fun/): AI-assisted RSS reader that automatically tags and scores news entries so you only see relevant stories.
- [Fern](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/fern/): Fern generates API documentation, SDKs, and CLIs from OpenAPI, GraphQL, AsyncAPI, and gRPC specs, and operates as a Postman company.
- [FerretDB](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/ferretdb/): An open-source proxy that translates the MongoDB wire protocol to PostgreSQL, offering a MongoDB-compatible database.
- [Fetcher](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/fetcher/): Fetcher is an AI-powered candidate sourcing platform that delivers qualified, engaged candidates to recruiting teams.
- [FHEM](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/fhem/): FHEM is a free, open-source Perl server for home automation, controlling devices and logging sensor data locally.
- [Fibery](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/fibery/): Fibery is a modular work platform that combines relational databases, docs, whiteboards, and automations with a built-in AI assistant.
- [Figma](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/figma/): A browser-based, real-time collaborative interface design tool for designing, prototyping, and shipping digital products.
- [Figures](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/figures/): Compensation management software for salary benchmarking, salary bands, and collaborative pay reviews.
- [FileBrowser](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/filebrowser/): Open-source, self-hosted web file manager you install on your own server via a single binary or Docker image.
- [FileGator](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/filegator/): FileGator is a free, open-source, self-hosted multi-user web file manager with drag-and-drop uploads and pluggable storage backends.
- [FileRun](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/filerun/): FileRun is a self-hosted, proprietary file sync and share platform with one-time and per-user annual pricing, and no ongoing free tier.
- [Filestash](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/filestash/): Filestash is an open-source, self-hosted file manager for 30+ storage backends, with a free Hobby tier and paid Self Served/Enterprise plans.
- [Filevine](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/filevine/): Cloud-based legal case management platform with firm-wide AI agents, built on the LOIS system.
- [Fillout](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/fillout/): Fillout is an all-in-one form, quiz, and survey builder with drag-and-drop design, conditional logic, payments, and 50+ integrations.
- [Final Cut Pro](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/final-cut-pro/): Apple's professional video editing software for Mac, featuring the Magnetic Timeline, ProRes support, and Apple Silicon optimization.
- [Findem](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/findem/): Findem is an AI talent intelligence platform combining assistive, agentic, and embedded AI for sourcing and analytics.
- [Firebase](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/firebase/): Google's backend-as-a-service platform for building, scaling, and monitoring mobile and web apps with real-time databases, auth, and hosting.
- [Firefly III](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/firefly-iii/): Firefly III is a free, open-source, self-hosted personal finance manager licensed under AGPLv3, with a full REST API.
- [Firefox Account Server](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/firefox-account-server/): Open-source identity backend behind Firefox Sync that advanced self-hosters can deploy independently of Mozilla.
- [Fireworks AI](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/fireworks-ai/): Fireworks AI is a pay-as-you-go inference platform for running, fine-tuning, and deploying open-source generative AI models at scale.
- [FitTrackee](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/fittrackee/): Self-hosted, open-source outdoor activity tracker for logging workouts from GPX files with statistics, maps, and federation.
- [Fivetran](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/fivetran/): Fivetran is an automated ELT platform with hundreds of connectors that syncs SaaS and database data into your cloud data warehouse or lake.
- [Flagsmith](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/flagsmith/): Flagsmith is an open-source feature flag and remote config platform for web, mobile, and server apps, deployable in the cloud or self-hosted.
- [Flarum](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/flarum/): Free, open-source forum software built on Laravel with a large community extension ecosystem.
- [FlatPress](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/flatpress/): Databaseless PHP blogging platform that stores every post as a flat file, with themes, plugins, and comment spam protection.
- [FleetDM](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/fleetdm/): Fleet (FleetDM) is an open-source device management platform built on osquery for managing macOS, Linux, Windows, iOS, and Android.
- [Flexisip](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/flexisip/): A modular, open-source SIP server suite from Belledonne Communications for self-hosted voice, video, and messaging services.
- [Fliki](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/fliki/): Fliki turns scripts, blog posts, and ideas into finished videos with AI voiceovers in 2,000+ voices, AI avatars, and translation into 80+ languages.
- [Flipt](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/flipt/): Flipt is a Git-native, self-hosted feature flag platform where flag changes become reviewable Git commits, deployable as a single binary.
- [Float](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/float/): Resource management and team scheduling software for agencies and professional services firms, with capacity planning, time tracking, and forecasting.
- [Float Financial](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/float-financial/): Float provides Canadian corporate cards, CDIC-insured business accounts, bill pay, and AI-powered expense automation.
- [Flock](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/flock/): Team messaging app with channels, video calls, shared to-dos, polls, and built-in productivity tools for growing teams.
- [flowctl](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/flowctl/): flowctl is a free, open-source, self-hosted workflow automation platform with YAML flows, approval gates, and a single binary.
- [FlowForge](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/flowforge/): FlowForge (now FlowFuse) builds on open-source Node-RED to deploy, manage, and secure low-code flows across teams and sites.
- [Flowise](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/flowise/): Open-source, drag-and-drop platform for building AI agents, chatbots, and RAG workflows.
- [Fluent Bit](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/fluent-bit/): Lightweight, CNCF-graduated telemetry agent for collecting, processing, and forwarding logs, metrics, and traces.
- [Fluentd](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/fluentd/): Open source, CNCF-graduated data collector that unifies logging across systems with over 500 plugins.
- [Fluidd](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/fluidd/): Free, open-source web dashboard for controlling and monitoring 3D printers running the Klipper firmware.
- [Flux](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/flux/): Flux is a free, open-source, CNCF Graduated GitOps tool that syncs Kubernetes clusters with the state declared in Git.
- [Fly.io](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/fly-io/): Fly.io is a developer cloud platform for deploying apps as VMs (Fly Machines) in regions close to users, with usage-based pricing.
- [Flyimg](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/flyimg/): Self-hosted, open-source Docker app that resizes, crops, and compresses images on the fly, like a self-hosted Cloudinary.
- [FMD Server](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/fmd-server/): FMD Server is the open-source backend behind Find My Device (FMD Android), letting you self-host device location and control.
- [Folk](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/folk/): folk is a CRM that centralizes contacts, pipelines, and outreach with LinkedIn-based enrichment and AI follow-up and research assistants.
- [Fonoa](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/fonoa/): Fonoa is an AI-driven tax technology platform for global indirect tax, covering VAT/GST calculation, e-invoicing, and returns.

- [Formbricks](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/formbricks/): Formbricks is an open-source experience management platform for building and deploying surveys across websites, apps, and emails, with self-hosting available.
- [Formcarry](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/formcarry/): Formcarry is a form backend service that turns plain HTML forms into working contact and order forms with email notifications and spam protection.

- [GIMP](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/gimp/): GIMP is a free, open-source image editor for photo retouching, illustration, and graphic design on Linux, macOS, and Windows.
- [Git Annex](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/git-annex/): A free, open-source Git extension for tracking, syncing, and archiving large files without storing content in Git.
- [GitBook](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/gitbook/): GitBook is a Git-synced documentation platform with an AI assistant, API playgrounds, and enterprise-grade security.
- [Gitea](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/gitea/): Gitea is a free, MIT-licensed, self-hosted Git service with built-in CI/CD, issue tracking, and package registry support.
- [GitGuardian](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/gitguardian/): Secrets detection and non-human identity governance platform that finds and remediates exposed credentials in code and CI/CD.
- [GitHub](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/github/): A web-based Git platform for version control, code review, and collaborative software development, with built-in CI/CD via GitHub Actions.
- [GitHub Copilot](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/github-copilot/): AI pair programmer from GitHub and OpenAI that suggests code, chats about your codebase, and can autonomously open pull requests.
- [Gitleaks](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/gitleaks/): Gitleaks is a free, open-source CLI tool that scans git repos, files, and directories for hardcoded secrets like API keys and passwords.
- [Gladly](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/gladly/): Customer experience AI platform that unifies support conversations across channels around a single customer timeline.
- [Gladys](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/gladys/): Gladys Assistant is a free, open-source, self-hosted home automation platform with an optional paid Gladys Plus tier for remote access.
- [Glassbox](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/glassbox/): Glassbox is a digital customer experience analytics platform with session replay, journey mapping, and AI-assisted insights for regulated industries.
- [Glean](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/glean/): Glean is an enterprise Work AI platform that unifies company data and apps to power permission-aware search, AI agents, and automation.
- [Glide](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/glide/): No-code platform that turns spreadsheets, Airtable, or databases into mobile and web apps, with AI-assisted app generation.
- [GlitchTip](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/glitchtip/): GlitchTip is an open-source, Sentry-compatible error and performance monitoring platform available as SaaS or self-hosted.
- [GlobaLeaks](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/globaleaks/): Open-source software framework for running a secure, anonymous whistleblowing submission platform.
- [GLPI](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/glpi/): Open-source IT service management and asset/CMDB platform, self-hosted for free or via paid GLPI Network Cloud plans.
- [GlusterFS](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/glusterfs/): Free, open-source distributed network filesystem for scalable storage across standard hardware, sponsored by Red Hat.

- [GoAccess](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/goaccess/): Free, open-source real-time web log analyzer with a terminal dashboard and browser-based reporting.
- [goatcounter](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/goatcounter/): A privacy-focused, GDPR-conscious website analytics tool with publicly-handled support via GitHub issues.
- [GoCardless](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/gocardless/): GoCardless automates recurring payment collection via SEPA, UK Direct Debit, and Autogiro, with pay-as-you-go pricing and 350+ integrations.
- [GoCD](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/gocd/): GoCD is a free, open-source continuous delivery server from Thoughtworks that visualizes complex deployment pipelines end to end.
- [GoDaddy Website Builder](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/godaddy-website-builder/): GoDaddy Website Builder is an AI-assisted, no-code site builder that helps small businesses launch a website, blog, or online store in minutes.
- [Gogs](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/gogs/): Gogs is a free, MIT-licensed, self-hosted Git service written in Go that runs on minimal hardware.
- [Goldcast](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/goldcast/): AI-first B2B video platform for hosting webinars and virtual events, then repurposing recordings into clips, blogs, and social posts.
- [GoModel](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/gomodel/): Free, open-source AI gateway that routes requests to 20+ LLM providers through one OpenAI-compatible API.
- [Gong](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/gong/): AI-powered revenue platform that captures sales calls and customer interactions to power forecasting, coaching, and deal insights.
- [Google Analytics](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/google-analytics/): Google Analytics (GA4) is Google's free, event-based platform for tracking website and app user behavior, conversions, and marketing performance.
- [Google Classroom](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/google-classroom/): Free Google tool for creating classes, distributing assignments, grading work, and messaging students and parents from one connected hub.
- [Google Cloud](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/google-cloud/): Google Cloud is Google's public cloud platform for compute, storage, data analytics, and AI, built on the infrastructure behind Search and YouTube.
- [Google Cloud Storage](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/google-cloud-storage/): Google's object storage service for storing and retrieving any amount of data, with tiered classes for hot, cool, and archival access.
- [Google Drive](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/google-drive/): Google Drive is Google's cloud storage and file sync service, integrated with Docs, Sheets, and Slides, offering 15GB free and paid upgrades.
- [Google Forms](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/google-forms/): Google Forms is Google's free tool for building online forms, surveys, and quizzes, with responses collected automatically into Google Sheets.
- [Google Gemini](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/google-gemini/): Google's multimodal AI chat assistant and model family, built into Search, Workspace, Android, and available to developers via API.
- [Google Workspace](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/google-workspace/): A cloud productivity suite combining Gmail, Docs, Drive, Meet, and Calendar for business email, collaboration, and storage.
- [goploader](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/goploader/): Open-source Go client/server for sharing files from the terminal with server-side encryption, MIT licensed.
- [Gorgias](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/gorgias/): Ecommerce helpdesk with native Shopify order data, live chat, and an AI Agent that answers and resolves support tickets automatically.
- [GoTab](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/gotab/): GoTab is a POS and mobile order-and-pay platform for restaurants, breweries, and hospitality venues.
- [Gotenberg](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/gotenberg/): A free, open-source Docker API for converting HTML, Office documents, and Markdown into PDFs, and merging or manipulating PDFs.
- [Gotify](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/gotify/): Gotify is a free, open-source, self-hosted server for sending and receiving push messages via REST API and WebSocket, with an Android app.
- [GoTo Meeting](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/goto-meeting/): GoTo Meeting is a longstanding video conferencing platform with HD video, screen sharing, cloud recording, and AI meeting transcription.
- [GoToSocial](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/gotosocial/): A lightweight, self-hosted ActivityPub server that provides Mastodon-API-compatible federated social networking with a small resource footprint.
- [GPT4All](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/gpt4all/): Free, open-source desktop app for running open-source LLMs privately on your own computer.
- [GPTZero](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/gptzero/): AI writing detector that scores text for AI-generated content, flags mixed authorship, and checks for plagiarism.
- [gql.tada](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/gql-tada/): Magical GraphQL query engine for TypeScript
- [Grade.us](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/grade-us/): Grade.us is a white-label review management platform built for marketing agencies to manage client reviews.
- [Grafana](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/grafana/): Grafana is an open-source platform for visualizing and alerting on metrics, logs, and traces from Prometheus, Loki, and 100+ other data sources.
- [Grammarly](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/grammarly/): An AI-powered writing assistant offering grammar checking, tone adjustment, plagiarism detection, and AI-generated text across desktop, browser, and mobile.
- [Gramps Web](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/gramps-web/): Free, open-source, self-hosted web genealogy system that works standalone or alongside Gramps Desktop.
- [GrandNode](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/grandnode/): GrandNode is a free, open-source ASP.NET Core e-commerce platform released under the GPL-3 license, with optional paid support packages.
- [GrapesJS](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/grapesjs/): Open-source JavaScript framework for building drag-and-drop visual web builders and template editors.
- [GraphHopper](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/graphhopper/): Routing and route optimization API and open-source engine for building navigation, delivery, and mapping applications.
- [Graphviz](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/graphviz/): Graphviz is free, open-source software that generates diagrams from text-based graph descriptions.
- [Grav](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/grav/): Grav is a free, MIT-licensed flat-file CMS built on PHP and Symfony that stores content as files instead of a database.
- [Gravitee](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/gravitee/): Gravitee is an API management platform with AI agent governance, event streaming security, and a developer portal.
- [Graylog](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/graylog/): Centralized log management and SIEM platform with a free open-source edition and paid enterprise/security tiers.
- [Greenbone](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/greenbone/): Greenbone is a German vulnerability management company offering the open-source OpenVAS scanner alongside a tiered family of commercial products.
- [Greenhouse](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/greenhouse/): Greenhouse is an enterprise applicant tracking and hiring platform for structured, AI-assisted recruiting, sourcing, and onboarding.
- [Grid My Business](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/grid-my-business/): Grid My Business is an AI-powered local SEO platform for geo-grid rank tracking and Google Business Profile automation.
- [Grip](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/grip/): AI-powered event platform for matchmaking, pre-scheduled meetings, and exhibitor and lead management.
- [Grist](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/grist/): Grist is an open-source spreadsheet-database hybrid that lets teams build no-code apps, forms, and automations from their data.
- [Grok](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/grok/): Grok is xAI's conversational AI chatbot offering real-time X integration, reasoning, coding help, and image/video generation via web, app, and API.
- [Groundcover](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/groundcover/): Cloud-native observability platform using eBPF for zero-instrumentation data collection, deployed inside the customer's own cloud (BYOC).
- [Group Office](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/group-office/): Open-source groupware and CRM platform for email, calendar, files, and business collaboration, self-hosted or hosted online.
- [GrowthBar](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/growthbar/): GrowthBar is an AI SEO writing tool for keyword research, SERP-based content outlines, and competitor backlink/ad analysis, now operated by SEOptimer.
- [GrowthBook](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/growthbook/): GrowthBook is a warehouse-native platform for running A/B tests, managing feature flags, and product analytics.
- [GrowthLoop](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/growthloop/): GrowthLoop is an agentic, composable customer data platform that activates cloud data warehouses for AI-driven marketing campaigns.
- [Grype](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/grype/): Grype is Anchore's open-source vulnerability scanner for container images, filesystems, and SBOMs across major OS and language package ecosystems.
- [Gumroad](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/gumroad/): Gumroad lets creators sell digital products, courses, memberships, and commissions directly to fans with a simple pay-per-sale fee.
- [Guru](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/guru/): Guru is an AI-powered enterprise knowledge management platform that structures, verifies, and delivers governed answers to people and AI tools.
- [Gusto](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/gusto/): Cloud-based payroll, benefits, and HR platform that helps small and medium U.S. businesses pay teams and stay compliant.
- [Habitica](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/habitica/): Gamified habit and to-do tracker that turns real-life tasks into an RPG, free to use with optional paid subscriptions.
- [Halaxy](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/halaxy/): Free practice management software for health practitioners, covering scheduling, patient records, invoicing, and telehealth.
- [HaloITSM](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/haloitsm/): Unified ITSM platform with all-inclusive per-agent pricing (from £66/agent/month), covering incident, change, problem, and asset management.
- [HandBrake](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/handbrake/): HandBrake is a free, open-source video transcoder for converting video to modern codecs like H.264, H.265, and AV1.
- [Hanko](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/hanko/): Hanko is an open-source, passkey-first authentication platform offering cloud, private cloud, and self-hosted deployment options.
- [HappyFox](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/happyfox/): HappyFox is cloud-based help desk and customer support ticketing software with automation, a knowledge base, and multi-channel support.
- [Haraka](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/haraka/): Haraka is an open-source, event-driven SMTP server built on Node.js with a JavaScript plugin architecture.
- [Harbor](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/harbor/): Open-source, CNCF-graduated container registry with built-in vulnerability scanning, RBAC, and image replication.
- [Harness](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/harness/): Harness is a software delivery platform covering CI, CD/GitOps, feature flags, security testing, and cloud cost management, with a free tier.
- [Harvest](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/harvest/): A time tracking and invoicing platform for monitoring hours, generating invoices, and analyzing project profitability, with Asana and Slack integrations.
- [Harvester](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/harvester/): Harvester is a free, open-source hyperconverged infrastructure platform for running VMs and cloud-native workloads on bare metal, built by SUSE/Rancher.
- [Harvey](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/harvey/): AI platform for law firms and in-house legal teams covering research, drafting, and document review.
- [HashiCorp Consul](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/hashicorp-consul/): Consul is HashiCorp's service networking platform providing service discovery, service mesh, and secure service-to-service communication.
- [HashiCorp Vault](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/hashicorp-vault/): HashiCorp Vault secures, stores, and tightly controls access to tokens, passwords, certificates, and encryption keys.
- [Hasura](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/hasura/): Hasura provides an instant GraphQL API layer over databases, plus PromptQL, an AI product for querying business data accurately.
- [Hatsu](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/hatsu/): A self-hosted bridge that adds automated ActivityPub/Fediverse federation to any static blog or website.
- [havenweb](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/havenweb/)
- [healthchecks](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/healthchecks/): Get instant alerts when your cron jobs, background workers, scheduled tasks don't run on time. Monitor up to 20 cron jobs for free.
- [Healthie](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/healthie/): Healthie is a cloud-based EHR and practice management platform with AI scribe, telehealth, billing, and plans starting at $19/month.
- [Heap](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/heap/): Digital analytics platform that autocaptures every user interaction so teams can retroactively analyze behavior without pre-instrumenting events.
- [Heartbeat](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/heartbeat/): All-in-one monetized community platform combining membership management, courses, events, and payments.
- [HedgeDoc](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/hedgedoc/): HedgeDoc is a free, open-source, self-hosted, real-time collaborative Markdown editor.
- [Height](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/height/): Height was an AI-driven project management and issue-tracking tool for product teams; the service was discontinued in September 2025.
- [Helicone](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/helicone/): Helicone is an open-source AI gateway and LLM observability platform for logging, debugging, and analyzing LLM application traffic.
- [Helium](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/helium/): A free, open-source student planner that combines class schedules, assignments, and grade tracking in one calendar.
- [Help Scout](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/help-scout/): A customer support platform with a shared inbox, live chat, knowledge base (Docs), and a pay-per-resolution AI Answers add-on.
- [HelpCrunch](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/helpcrunch/): Customer communication platform unifying live chat, chatbot, shared inbox, and email marketing in one dashboard.
- [Helpjuice](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/helpjuice/): Helpjuice is a knowledge base platform with AI-powered writing, search, and a chatbot for internal and customer-facing documentation.
- [Helpy](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/helpy/): Helpdesk platform with ticketing, live chat, and knowledge base, offered self-hosted, on private cloud, or as SaaS.
- [Heptabase](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/heptabase/): Heptabase is a visual whiteboard-based knowledge base with an AI tutor and PDF annotation for students and researchers.
- [Heroku](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/heroku/): Heroku is a cloud platform-as-a-service owned by Salesforce that lets developers deploy, manage, and scale apps via git push, dynos, and buildpacks.
- [HetrixTools](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/hetrixtools/): Uptime, server, and blacklist monitoring platform with a free-forever tier for hosting providers and site owners.
- [Hetzner](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/hetzner/): Hetzner Online is a German hosting provider offering dedicated servers, cloud servers, storage, and web hosting at competitive prices.
- [Heyflow](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/heyflow/): Heyflow is a no-code funnel and interactive form builder for lead generation, with native ad tracking, payments, and appointment booking built into the flow.
- [HeyForm](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/heyform/): Open-source Typeform alternative with AI-assisted form generation, conditional logic, and 40+ integrations.
- [HeyGen](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/heygen/): AI video generation platform that turns text into lifelike avatar videos with voice cloning, dubbing, and translation.
- [hi](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/hi/): Event ticketing with the lowest fees in the industry. Instant payouts, custom branding, full data ownership. Use our cloud or self-host for free. The Eventbrite alternative.
- [HiBob](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/hibob/): Bob by HiBob is a cloud HR platform unifying core HR, payroll, performance, compensation, and engagement for mid-sized, fast-growing companies.
- [Higher Logic Vanilla](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/higher-logic-vanilla/): B2B/B2C customer community platform, originally Vanilla Forums (2009), acquired by Higher Logic in 2021.
- [Highlight.io](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/highlight-io/): Highlight.io is an open-source, full-stack monitoring platform combining session replay, error monitoring, logging and tracing for web apps.
- [Hindenburg](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/hindenburg/): Audio editing software for journalists and podcasters, combining transcript-based and waveform editing.
- [HireEZ](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/hireez/): hireEZ is an agentic AI recruiting layer that sources, screens, and schedules candidates on top of an existing ATS.
- [HitKeep](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/hitkeep/): Privacy-first, MIT-licensed web analytics available as a managed cloud service or a single-binary self-hosted server.

- [Home Assistant](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/home-assistant/): Open-source home automation platform that unifies smart home devices under one local, privacy-focused dashboard.
- [Homebase](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/homebase/): All-in-one scheduling, time tracking, payroll, and team communication app built for hourly and shift-based small businesses.

- [Horilla](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/horilla/): Open-source HRMS with attendance, payroll, recruitment, and performance modules, free to self-host or available as paid cloud hosting.
- [HortusFox](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/hortusfox/): Self-hosted, open-source platform for tracking and managing a houseplant collection, with reminders and a plant community.

- [Hotjar Surveys](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/hotjar-surveys/): On-site and link surveys from Hotjar for collecting direct user feedback with no-code widgets, NPS/CSAT templates, and AI-assisted analysis.
- [Housecall Pro](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/housecall-pro/): Field service management software for scheduling, dispatch, invoicing, and payments in home service businesses.
- [HTMLy](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/htmly/): Databaseless PHP blogging platform and flat-file CMS with fast content indexing, scheduled posts, and two-factor authentication.
- [HTTPie](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/httpie/): HTTPie is an open-source API testing toolset with a CLI, a cross-platform desktop app, and a web app.
- [HubSpot](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/hubspot/): A customer platform combining marketing automation, sales, and service software, built around inbound marketing to attract, convert, and retain customers at scale.
- [HubSpot CRM](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/hubspot-crm/): Free CRM for managing contacts, deals, and pipelines, with optional paid Marketing, Sales, and Service Hub add-ons from HubSpot.
- [Hubstaff](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/hubstaff/): Time tracking and workforce management software with screenshots, activity levels, GPS tracking, and automated payroll for remote and field teams.
- [Hubzilla](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/hubzilla/): A decentralized social networking and publishing platform with nomadic identity that lets accounts move or clone across independently run servers.

- [Hugo](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/hugo/): Free, open-source static site generator written in Go, known for very fast site builds.

- [Humaans](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/humaans/): AI-powered HRIS that centralizes employee data, workflow automation, and an AI Companion for employee self-service, for growing companies.
- [Humanitix](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/humanitix/): Humanitix is a charity-backed event ticketing platform that directs 100% of its profits to charitable causes.

- [Hunter](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/hunter/): Email outreach platform for finding, verifying, and emailing business contacts via Domain Search, Email Finder, and Email Verifier.

- [Hurl](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/hurl/): Hurl is a free, open-source Rust-based command-line tool for running and testing HTTP requests from plain text files.
- [Hydrogen](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/hydrogen/): Hydrogen is a free, open-source drum machine for pattern-based drum programming on Linux, macOS, and Windows.
- [Hygraph](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/hygraph/): GraphQL-native headless CMS for managing structured, relational content across multiple channels at enterprise scale.
- [Hypefury](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/hypefury/): Hypefury is a social media scheduling and automation tool that lets creators write once and cross-post to LinkedIn, Instagram, Threads, Bluesky, and more.
- [HyperDX](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/hyperdx/): HyperDX is an open-source observability platform unifying session replay, logs, traces, metrics, and errors, powered by ClickHouse.
- [HyperKitty](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/hyperkitty/): HyperKitty is the free, open-source web archiver for GNU Mailman 3, letting users browse and search mailing list discussions in a browser.
- [Hyperline](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/hyperline/): Revenue management platform that automates quote-to-cash billing, invoicing, and usage metering for SaaS companies.
- [Hyperping](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/hyperping/): Uptime monitoring platform with built-in status pages and on-call escalation, including a free forever plan.
- [Hyperproof](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/hyperproof/): AI-powered GRC platform that automates compliance evidence collection, risk monitoring, and audit management across 160+ frameworks.
- [HyperWrite](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/hyperwrite/): AI writing assistant with predictive autocomplete, chat, and web-wide browser tools to help you draft and edit faster.
- [Hyphanet](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/hyphanet/): Open-source, decentralized peer-to-peer network for censorship-resistant, anonymous publishing and communication.
- [Hypotenuse AI](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/hypotenuse-ai/): Hypotenuse AI is a product experience management platform that enriches ecommerce product data and auto-generates SEO descriptions and imagery.
- [I, Librarian](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/i-librarian/): A PDF and reference management platform for research teams, available as a free open-source edition or a paid hosted/self-hosted subscription.
- [Icecast 2](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/icecast-2/): Free, open-source streaming media server for internet radio and audio/video broadcasting, maintained by Xiph.Org.
- [IceHrm](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/icehrm/): A complete HR toolkit covering employee management, leave, attendance, payroll, performance reviews, and recruitment.
- [Icertis](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/icertis/): Icertis is an AI-native contract intelligence platform used by Fortune 500 companies to draft, manage, and analyze contracts using its Vera AI.
- [Iceshrimp.NET](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/iceshrimp-net/): Open-source, self-hosted ActivityPub microblogging server built from scratch in .NET for performance and maintainability.
- [iCIMS](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/icims/): iCIMS is an enterprise applicant tracking system with agentic AI (Coalesce AI) for sourcing, screening, and candidate matching at scale.
- [Icinga](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/icinga/): Open-source infrastructure monitoring platform for hybrid IT environments, with a forever-free core and paid enterprise subscriptions.
- [Iconosquare](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/iconosquare/): Analytics-first social media management platform for scheduling, reporting, and listening across Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, X, and Facebook.
- [iDempiere](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/idempiere/): A free, open-source Tier II ERP/CRM/SCM system built on Java, ZK, and OSGi, maintained by a volunteer community.
- [Ideogram](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/ideogram/): AI image generator best known for producing legible, accurate text inside images, with style presets, editing tools, and an API.
- [IDrive](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/idrive/): Cloud backup service for PCs, Macs, mobile devices, NAS, and servers, with unlimited devices per plan and low per-TB pricing.
- [IFTTT](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/ifttt/): No-code automation platform that connects apps, devices, and services with simple trigger-action "applets".
- [ILIAS](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/ilias/): An open-source learning management system, in use since 1998, that universities, schools, and enterprises can self-host.
- [iLovePDF](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/ilovepdf/): Web-based PDF toolkit for merging, splitting, compressing, converting, editing, and e-signing PDF files, with mobile apps and a developer API.
- [ImgCompress](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/imgcompress/): Free, self-hosted Docker tool for bulk image compression and format conversion across 70+ formats, with offline AI background removal.
- [Immich](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/immich/): Self-hosted photo and video backup application with mobile auto-backup, built as an open-source alternative to cloud photo storage.
- [Inboxen](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/inboxen/): Open-source disposable/anonymous email software; its public hosted instance at inboxen.org has shut down, but the code remains self-hostable.
- [indico](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/indico/): Open-source event management system built at CERN for organizing conferences, meetings, and lectures with registration and scheduling.
- [Infisical](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/infisical/): Open-source platform for managing application secrets, PKI certificates, and privileged access across cloud and AI infrastructure.
- [InfluxDB Cloud](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/influxdb-cloud/): InfluxDB Cloud is a managed time-series database for ingesting, storing, and analyzing high-velocity operational and sensor data in real time.
- [INGInious](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/inginious/): An open-source automated grading platform that gives students instant feedback on programming assignments.
- [Inkscape](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/inkscape/): Inkscape is a free, open-source vector graphics editor for illustrations, logos, and diagrams using the SVG format.
- [Inngest](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/inngest/): Inngest is a durable execution platform for building reliable workflows, AI agents, and background jobs directly in application code.
- [Insightly](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/insightly/): Cloud CRM combining sales pipelines, native project delivery, and marketing automation for small and mid-sized B2B teams.
- [Insomnia](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/insomnia/): Insomnia is a Kong-owned API platform supporting REST, GraphQL, gRPC, and WebSocket, with free and paid plans.
- [InspIRCd](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/inspircd/): InspIRCd is a free, open-source, modular IRC server (IRCv3-compliant) for UNIX-like systems and Windows.
- [Instantly](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/instantly/): Instantly is a sales engagement platform for cold email outreach, a large lead database, and AI agents that automate prospecting and replies.
- [Instapage](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/instapage/): A landing page builder focused on turning ad clicks into customers with personalized pages, AI content generation, and conversion analytics.
- [Instatus](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/instatus/): Instatus lets teams monitor services, manage incidents, and publish branded public or private status pages for customers.
- [Integrately](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/integrately/): No-code automation platform offering 20M+ pre-built, one-click automations across 1,500+ apps.
- [IntelliCode](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/intellicode-vscode/): An AI-assisted IntelliSense extension for VS Code that predicts whole-line code completions and surfaces real-world API usage examples for Python, TypeScript/JavaScript, and Java.
- [Interakt](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/interakt/): Interakt is a WhatsApp, Instagram, and RCS customer engagement platform with a no-code chatbot builder, CRM, and AI agents.
- [Intercom](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/intercom/): A customer service platform centered on the Fin AI Agent for automated issue resolution, combined with messaging, ticketing, and help center tools.
- [Internxt](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/internxt/): Internxt is an open-source, end-to-end encrypted cloud storage service from Spain that shards and zero-knowledge-encrypts files for privacy.
- [InvenioRDM](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/inveniordm/): Free, open-source, turn-key research data management repository built by CERN and partners for institutions to manage and share research data.
- [Inventaire](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/inventaire/): Open-source, non-profit platform for cataloging your books and sharing, lending, or giving them to friends and communities.
- [Inventree](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/inventree/): Open-source inventory management system for parts, stock control, and bill-of-materials tracking, built on Python/Django.
- [InvGate Service Desk](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/invgate-service-desk/): No-code ITSM platform with embedded AI, offering a fixed-price Starter plan from $1,499/year and per-agent Pro/Enterprise tiers.
- [InVideo](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/invideo/): AI-powered online video creation platform that turns text prompts and templates into ready-to-publish videos for social media and marketing.
- [Invoice Ninja](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/invoice-ninja/): Invoice Ninja is invoicing and business management software with a free plan, paid hosted plans from $14/month, and a self-hosted open-source version.
- [involve.me](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/involve-me/): involve.me builds interactive quizzes, forms, calculators, and surveys that score leads and trigger automated email sequences.
- [ioBroker](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/iobroker/): Open-source, Node.js-based integration platform for connecting and automating smart home and IoT devices.
- [iRedMail](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/iredmail/): Open-source installer that bundles Postfix, Dovecot, and webmail into a complete mail server on Linux and BSD.
- [Ironclad](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/ironclad/): Enterprise contract lifecycle management platform combining AI-assisted drafting, workflow automation, and a searchable contract repository.
- [Islandora](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/islandora/): Open-source digital asset management platform, built on Drupal, for managing and preserving digital collections in libraries, archives, and museums.
- [Isso](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/isso/): Lightweight, self-hosted comment server written in Python, built as a privacy-friendly alternative to Disqus.
- [Iterable](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/iterable/): An AI-powered customer engagement platform for real-time, personalized cross-channel experiences at enterprise scale.
- [iTop](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/itop/): French open-source ITSM and CMDB platform with a free Community tier and paid Atelier/Forge subscriptions.
- [Jaeger](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/jaeger/): Open source, CNCF-graduated distributed tracing platform for monitoring and troubleshooting microservices.
- [Jamf](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/jamf/): Apple device management and security platform (MDM) that connects, manages, and protects Mac, iPhone, iPad, and Apple TV fleets.
- [Jami](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/jami/): Free, open-source, peer-to-peer messenger with end-to-end encrypted chat, audio, and video calls and no central server.

- [Janus](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/janus/): Open-source, self-hosted WebRTC gateway server from Meetecho for building custom real-time audio, video, and data applications.

- [LevelEleven](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/leveleleven/): Sales performance management software that turns Salesforce data into scorecards, coaching views, and team competitions.
- [Lever](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/lever/): Lever (LeverTRM) is an enterprise applicant tracking system with built-in CRM for sourcing, interviewing, and hiring at scale.
- [Lexion](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/lexion/): Lexion is an AI-powered contract management platform for legal, sales, procurement, HR, and finance teams, now part of Docusign.
- [Libre Translate](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/libre-translate/): Free, open-source machine translation API that can run fully offline and self-hosted, or via a paid hosted API.
- [librebooking](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/librebooking/)
- [LibreChat](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/librechat/): Open-source, self-hosted chat platform that unifies multiple AI models and providers in one interface.
- [LibreKB](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/librekb/): Free, open-source, self-hosted knowledge base application for building documentation and support sites.
- [LibreNMS](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/librenms/): Open source, auto-discovering network monitoring system supporting SNMP, CDP, LLDP, OSPF, and BGP across a wide range of network hardware.
- [LibreOffice](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/libreoffice/): LibreOffice is a free, open-source office suite with word processing, spreadsheet, presentation, and database tools.
- [LibrePhotos](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/librephotos/): Self-hosted, open-source photo management service with AI-powered face recognition, object detection, and semantic search.
- [LibreSign](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/libresign/): Open-source, AGPL-licensed e-signature app for Nextcloud that lets organizations self-host document signing.
- [LibreTime](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/libretime/): Open-source radio broadcast automation platform for scheduling, library management, and AM/FM or web playout.
- [Libsyn](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/libsyn/): Libsyn is a long-running podcast hosting platform with audio and video distribution, Pro Analytics and a 30-day free trial.
- [Lidarr](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/lidarr/): Open-source, self-hosted music collection manager that automates monitoring, downloading, and organizing albums via Usenet and BitTorrent.
- [Lightdash](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/lightdash/): Lightdash is an open source, AI-native BI platform built on dbt that lets teams build governed dashboards as code.
- [Lightspeed Restaurant](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/lightspeed-restaurant/): Cloud-based restaurant POS from Lightspeed Commerce, deployed in about 150,000 locations worldwide.
- [Lightspeed Retail](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/lightspeed-retail/): Cloud-based POS and retail management platform handling inventory, payments, eCommerce, and reporting for single and multi-location stores.

- [Microsoft Copilot](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/microsoft-copilot/): Microsoft's AI assistant built into Windows, Edge, and Microsoft 365 for chat, search, writing, and image generation.
- [Microsoft Designer](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/microsoft-designer/): Free AI-powered design tool from Microsoft for social posts, invitations, and logos, using DALL-E image generation and templates.
- [Microsoft Entra ID](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/microsoft-entra-id/): Microsoft's cloud identity and access management platform for secure sign-in, SSO, and adaptive access across apps and devices.
- [Microsoft Forms](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/microsoft-forms/): Microsoft's free web-based tool for building surveys, quizzes, and polls, with real-time results and deep Microsoft 365 integration.
- [Microsoft Power Apps](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/microsoft-power-apps/): Microsoft's low-code platform for building custom business apps, connecting data, and automating workflows across the Microsoft ecosystem.
- [Microsoft Power Automate](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/microsoft-power-automate/): Microsoft's low-code automation platform for building workflows, RPA bots, and AI-powered flows across apps and services.
- [Microsoft Power BI](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/microsoft-power-bi/): Microsoft's BI and data visualization platform for building interactive reports and dashboards from virtually any data source.
- [Microsoft Project](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/microsoft-project/): Microsoft's enterprise project management software for scheduling, resource management, and portfolio tracking within the Microsoft 365 ecosystem.
- [Microsoft Teams](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/microsoft-teams/): Chat, video meetings, and file collaboration built into Microsoft 365, connecting teams across Office apps in one workspace.
- [Microweber](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/microweber/): Open-source drag-and-drop CMS and website builder with built-in e-commerce, free to self-host or available on paid cloud hosting plans.
- [middlewarehq](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/middlewarehq/)
- [Midjourney](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/midjourney/): AI image generator that turns text prompts into artistic, high-quality visuals via a web app and Discord bot.
- [Mighty Networks](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/mighty-networks/): Mighty Networks is a community platform for courses, events, and memberships with native iOS and Android apps and an AI Cohost.
- [Milanote](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/milanote/): Milanote is a visual tool for organizing creative projects with notes, images, and boards, offering a free plan and paid Pro/Team tiers.
- [Milvus](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/milvus/): Open-source vector database built for GenAI applications, scaling similarity search to tens of billions of vectors.
- [Mindustry](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/mindustry/): Mindustry is a free, open-source sandbox tower-defense game combining factory automation with real-time combat.
- [Miniflux](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/miniflux/): Minimalist, privacy-focused RSS and Atom feed reader written in Go, self-hostable or available as a low-cost hosted service.
- [MinIO](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/minio/): S3-compatible object storage system, now shipped as MinIO AIStor with a free single-node tier and paid Enterprise tiers.
- [MintHCM](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/minthcm/): Free, open-source Human Capital Management system for recruitment, employee records, performance, and leave management, self-hosted under AGPLv3.
- [Mintlify](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/mintlify/): Mintlify is a documentation platform with a web editor, AI chat, and an MCP server, used by companies including Anthropic and Coinbase.
- [Minus Games](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/minus-games/): Small open-source suite for self-hosting a personal game and save-file sync server between devices like a Steam Deck and desktop PC.
- [Miro](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/miro/): A collaborative online whiteboard for diagramming, prototyping, and visual teamwork, with AI-powered workflows and agents on paid tiers.
- [MiroTalk](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/mirotalk/): Self-hosted, open-source WebRTC video conferencing platform with peer-to-peer, SFU, and end-to-end encrypted call modes.
- [MiroTalk C2C](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/mirotalk-c2c/): Open-source, self-hosted, end-to-end encrypted peer-to-peer video calling app for 1-to-1 'cam-to-cam' calls, embeddable via iframe.
- [MiroTalk P2P](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/mirotalk-p2p/): Free, open-source, self-hosted peer-to-peer video conferencing app with screen sharing, chat, whiteboard, and recording.
- [MiroTalk SFU](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/mirotalk-sfu/): Free, open-source, self-hosted video conferencing platform built on a Mediasoup SFU for scalable group calls with recording and streaming.
- [Misago](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/misago/): Modern, self-hosted forum platform built with Django and React, designed to be fast, scalable and customizable.
- [MISP](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/misp/): MISP is a free, open-source threat intelligence platform for collecting, correlating, and sharing indicators of compromise among security teams.
- [Missive](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/missive/): Missive is a collaborative email and team inbox app that combines shared inboxes, tasks, chat, and an AI assistant in one interface.
- [Misskey](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/misskey/): Misskey is free, open-source software for running a decentralized, ActivityPub-based social network.
- [MistServer](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/mistserver/): Streaming media server toolkit with a free open-source edition and commercially licensed editions for OTT delivery.
- [Mixpanel](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/mixpanel/): A digital analytics platform for tracking user behavior with product analytics, experiments, session replay, and behavioral cohorts.
- [Mixxx](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/mixxx/): Mixxx is free, open-source DJ software for live digital mixing with BPM/key detection, effects, and DJ controller support.
- [MJML](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/mjml/): MJML is a free, open-source markup language created by Mailjet in 2015 that compiles into responsive, cross-client HTML email.
- [MkDocs](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/mkdocs/): MkDocs is a free, open-source static site generator that builds project documentation from Markdown files and a single YAML config file.
- [MLflow](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/mlflow/): Open-source platform for tracking, evaluating, and deploying machine learning models and AI agent/LLM applications, backed by the Linux Foundation.
- [mlmmj](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/mlmmj/): mlmmj is a free, open-source mailing list manager designed to be simple, lightweight, and resource-efficient.
- [Mobilizon](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/mobilizon/): Mobilizon is free, open-source, federated software for creating, sharing, and finding events, originally built by Framasoft.
- [Mockoon](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/mockoon/): Mockoon is a free, open-source desktop app for designing and running mock REST APIs locally, with an optional paid Cloud tier.
- [MockServer](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/mockserver/): MockServer is a free, open-source tool to mock, proxy, and verify HTTP, HTTPS, gRPC, and GraphQL APIs for testing.
- [Modal](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/modal/): Modal is a serverless cloud platform for running Python code, AI inference, and training workloads with usage-based GPU pricing.
- [Modoboa](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/modoboa/): Modoboa is an open-source email server platform offering webmail, unlimited domains and mailboxes, and admin tools, installable in minutes.
- [MODX](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/modx/): MODX is a free, open-source PHP content management framework that gives developers full control over markup with no forced templates.
- [MoEngage](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/moengage/): MoEngage is an agentic customer engagement platform that unifies analytics, cross-channel marketing, and web/app personalization for consumer brands.
- [Mollie](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/mollie/): Mollie is a European payment processor offering online and in-person payment acceptance, subscriptions, invoicing, and business accounts.
- [Monday Sales CRM](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/monday-sales-crm/): Monday Sales CRM is a customizable, no-code CRM built on monday.com's Work OS for managing leads, pipelines, and deals visually.

- [MongooseIM](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/mongooseim/): Open-source, self-hosted, Erlang-based XMPP messaging server from Erlang Solutions built for scalable instant messaging.

- [Odoo Point of Sale](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/odoo-point-of-sale/): Odoo Point of Sale is a cloud and offline-capable POS app that syncs sales, inventory, and accounting across Odoo's business suite.
- [Offen](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/offen/): Free, open-source, self-hosted web analytics that requires opt-in consent and gives users full access to their own data.
- [Officevibe](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/officevibe/): Workleap Officevibe is an employee engagement platform using pulse surveys, anonymous feedback, and AI insights to help managers act.
- [Oh Dear](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/oh-dear/): Website health monitoring covering uptime, SSL, DNS, broken links, cron jobs, and performance, with every feature on every plan.
- [OhMD](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/ohmd/): AI patient communication platform for medical practices, featuring an AI voice agent, secure texting, and EHR integrations.
- [Okta](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/okta/): Okta is an enterprise identity and access management platform providing SSO, adaptive MFA, and lifecycle automation for workforce and customer identities.
- [Olark](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/olark/): Live chat software that helps businesses talk to website visitors in real time to boost sales and support.
- [Olive Video Editor](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/olive-video-editor/): Olive is a free, open-source, cross-platform non-linear video editor currently in active alpha development.
- [olivetin](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/olivetin/): Useful for routine jobs like restarting services, starting backup scripts, or sending pings, when direct SSH access is difficult, not possible, or a just pain to use.
- [Ollama](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/ollama/): Tool for running open-source LLMs locally, with optional paid cloud plans for scaled usage.
- [Ombi](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/ombi/): Self-hosted media request system for Plex and Emby that lets users request movies and TV shows for automatic fulfillment.

- [Omnisend](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/omnisend/): Email and SMS marketing automation platform built for ecommerce, with segmentation, forms, and pre-built workflows.

- [Omnivore](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/omnivore/): Open-source, self-hosted read-it-later app for saving, highlighting and annotating articles, now available only as a self-hosted server.

- [OnceHub](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/oncehub/): OnceHub combines self-serve booking pages with AI phone and web chat agents to screen, route, and schedule meetings.
- [Oncrawl](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/oncrawl/): Oncrawl is a cloud-based technical SEO platform combining website crawling and log file analysis to diagnose search visibility issues.
- [One Time Secret](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/one-time-secret/): Share sensitive information via self-destructing, one-time-view links, with an open-source self-hosted option and a free plan.

- [Oneflow](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/oneflow/): Oneflow is a Swedish contract lifecycle management platform with e-signatures, workflow automation, and AI-powered contract insights.
- [OneNote](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/onenote/): Microsoft's free digital notebook for typed and handwritten notes, syncing across devices and integrating with Microsoft 365.
- [OnePageCRM](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/onepagecrm/): Action-focused CRM for small businesses that turns contacts into a single prioritized to-do list of next sales actions.
- [OneSignal](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/onesignal/): Customer engagement platform for push, SMS/RCS, email, and in-app messaging, with AI-assisted campaign orchestration and a free tier.
- [Onloc](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/onloc/): Self-hosted device location tracker that lets you monitor and manage your own devices without third-party services.
- [ONLYOFFICE](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/onlyoffice/): ONLYOFFICE is an office suite for editing documents, spreadsheets, and presentations, offered as free open-source software and paid cloud/enterprise plans.

- [Permit.io](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/permit-io/): Permit.io is a real-time authorization platform for RBAC, ABAC, and ReBAC access control across apps and AI agents, built on OPA and OPAL.
- [Perplexity](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/perplexity/): AI-powered answer engine that searches the web in real time and delivers cited, conversational answers instead of link lists.
- [Persado](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/persado/): AI content generation platform for regulated industries that creates and validates compliant marketing content.
- [PersistIQ](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/persistiq/): Sales engagement platform for small teams to prospect, automate outreach, and sync with a CRM.
- [Personio](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/personio/): Personio is an all-in-one HR platform for European SMBs, covering recruiting, onboarding, absence, performance, and payroll prep.
- [Phorge](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/phorge/): Free, open-source, self-hosted developer toolkit forked from Phabricator, covering code review, task tracking, and repository hosting.
- [PhotoPrism](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/photoprism/): AI-powered, privacy-first, self-hosted app for browsing, organizing, and sharing photos and videos with face recognition and smart search.
- [PhotoStructure](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/photostructure/): Self-hosted personal photo and video manager with automatic deduplication and organization.
- [phpBB](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/phpbb/): phpBB is free, open-source PHP bulletin board software for self-hosted online forums, released under the GNU GPL.
- [phpIPAM](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/phpipam/): Free, open-source IP address management tool with IPv4/IPv6 tracking, VLAN/VRF support, and a REST API.
- [phpList](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/phplist/): phpList is free, open-source, self-hosted newsletter and email campaign software for sending to subscriber lists of any size.
- [Pi-hole](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/pi-hole/): A self-hosted DNS sinkhole that blocks ads and trackers network-wide without needing browser extensions.
- [PictShare](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/pictshare/): Self-hosted, open-source image CDN with on-the-fly resizing, filters, and album creation.
- [PieFed](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/piefed/): Open-source, federated link-aggregator and forum platform, an ActivityPub-based alternative to Reddit and Lemmy.
- [Pika](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/pika/): Pika is an AI video generator that turns text prompts or images into short video clips with creative effects and editing tools.
- [Piktochart](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/piktochart/): Cloud-based design platform for creating infographics, reports, presentations, and visual content with AI-assisted generation.
- [Pimcore](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/pimcore/): Pimcore is an open-source platform for content management, product information management (PIM), and digital asset management (DAM).
- [Pinecone](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/pinecone/): Managed vector database for storing and querying embeddings to power semantic search, RAG, and AI agents at scale.
- [Pinegrow](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/pinegrow/): Desktop visual editor for professional developers that works with real HTML/CSS, Bootstrap, Tailwind, and WordPress themes.
- [Pinepods](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/pinepods/): Self-hosted, Rust-based podcast manager with cross-device sync, YouTube channel subscriptions, and multi-user support.
- [Pingboard](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/pingboard/): Cloud-based org chart and employee directory software, now part of the Workleap employee experience suite.
- [Pingdom](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/pingdom/): Pingdom (by SolarWinds) is a synthetic monitoring service checking website and server uptime from 100+ global locations.
- [Pinpoint](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/pinpoint/): Pinpoint is a cloud-based applicant tracking system with AI hiring tools, branded careers sites, and end-to-end recruitment workflow management.
- [Pinry](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/pinry/): Open-source, self-hosted tiling image board for saving, tagging and sharing images, videos and web pages.
- [Pipe](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/pipe/): Pipe is an embedded financial operating system that lets software platforms offer capital and payment tools to their business customers.
- [Pipedream](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/pipedream/): Developer platform for connecting APIs, apps, and AI agents through visual workflows or code, with 3,000+ integrations.
- [Pipedrive](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/pipedrive/): Pipedrive is a sales-focused CRM built around a visual, drag-and-drop pipeline that helps small and mid-sized teams track deals and close more.
- [Pipefy](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/pipefy/): Pipefy is a no-code business process orchestration platform that lets teams digitize workflows and build AI agents to automate operations.

- [Rask AI](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/rask-ai/): Rask AI translates and dubs videos into 130+ languages using AI voice cloning, transcription, and lip-sync.
- [Ravio](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/ravio/): Real-time compensation benchmarking and management platform for global tech companies.
- [Ray](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/ray/): Ray is an open-source distributed computing framework for scaling Python and AI/ML workloads from a laptop to thousands of GPUs.
- [Raygun](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/raygun/): Raygun is an application monitoring platform offering crash reporting, real user monitoring, and APM for web and mobile apps.
- [Rclone](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/rclone/): Free, open-source command-line tool for syncing, copying, and mounting files across 70+ cloud storage providers.
- [Re:amaze](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/re-amaze/): Customer service platform combining live chat, email, social channels, and an AI agent in one inbox for ecommerce.
- [re:Director](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/re-director/): Self-hosted redirect manager that lets you connect any domain and set up custom URL redirects in seconds.
- [Reactive Resume](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/reactive-resume/): Free, open-source, privacy-focused resume builder that can be used online or self-hosted with Docker.
- [Readeck](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/readeck/): Self-hosted, open-source read-it-later app that saves readable copies of web articles, images and videos for offline keeping.
- [Readflow](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/readflow/): Self-hosted read-it-later and news reader with offline article saving, categorization, and webhook integrations.
- [ReadMe](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/readme/): ReadMe is an API documentation platform with a WYSIWYG editor, interactive API reference, and AI-assisted doc writing.
- [Readymag](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/readymag/): Readymag is a browser-based, no-code design tool for building animated websites, portfolios, presentations, and publications.
- [Reaparr](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/reaparr/): Cross-platform, open-source tool that downloads and copies media from any Plex server you have access to onto your own.
- [Recruit CRM](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/recruit-crm/): AI-first ATS and CRM for recruitment agencies, with AI sourcing, resume parsing, and native mobile apps.
- [Recruitee](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/recruitee/): Recruitee (Tellent Recruitee) is a cloud-based ATS with collaborative pipelines, a careers site builder, and AI-assisted screening for growing teams.
- [Recruiterflow](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/recruiterflow/): AI-native recruiting CRM and ATS for executive search firms and recruiting agencies, starting at $149/user/month.
- [Recurly](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/recurly/): Recurly is a subscription billing and revenue management platform that automates recurring billing, payment orchestration, churn recovery, and revenue recognition.
- [RecurPost](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/recurpost/): Social media scheduling platform with recurring content libraries, client approval workflows, and white-label reporting.
- [Red Eclipse 2](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/red-eclipse-2/): Red Eclipse 2 is a free, open-source first-person arena shooter built around parkour movement and fast multiplayer combat.
- [Redash](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/redash/): Redash is an open source tool for querying multiple data sources and building shareable SQL dashboards, now maintained under Databricks.
- [REDAXO](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/redaxo/): REDAXO is a free, open-source PHP content management system originating in Germany, built for sites ranging from small to complex portals.
- [RedCircle](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/redcircle/): RedCircle is a podcast hosting and monetization platform with a permanently free Core plan and a cross-promotion marketplace.
- [Redis](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/redis/): Open-source in-memory data store used as a database, cache, and message broker, with managed cloud and enterprise offerings from Redis Ltd.
- [Redmine](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/redmine/): Free, open-source, cross-platform project management and issue tracking web application built on Ruby on Rails.
- [Redocly](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/redocly/): Redocly is an API documentation platform (Realm) built around the open-source Redoc renderer, with plans starting at $10 per seat/month.
- [Reflect](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/reflect/): Reflect is a networked, backlinked note-taking app with end-to-end encryption and a GPT-4/Whisper-powered AI assistant for writing and transcription.

- [Relay Financial](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/relay-financial/): Relay is business banking software offering up to 20 checking accounts, high-yield savings, and expense management tools.
