- [Semgrep](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/semgrep/): Static analysis security platform combining SAST, software composition analysis, and secrets detection with AI-assisted triage.
- [Semrush](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/semrush/): A digital marketing platform combining SEO tools, competitive intelligence, and AI search visibility tracking for keyword research, site audits, and rank tracking.
- [Sender](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sender/): Email marketing platform with drag-and-drop campaigns, automation, and a free-forever plan for up to 2,500 subscribers.
- [SendGrid](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sendgrid/): Twilio-owned email delivery platform offering an Email API/SMTP service for developers and Marketing Campaigns for marketers.
- [Sendible](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sendible/): Sendible is a social media management platform for agencies and marketing teams to schedule, collaborate, monitor, and report across networks.
- [Sendmail](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sendmail/): Sendmail is a long-standing open-source mail transfer agent, with a commercial Sentrion edition offered by Proofpoint for larger deployments.
- [SendPulse](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sendpulse/): Multi-channel marketing platform combining email, SMS, chatbots, and a CRM, with a free tier for small volumes.
- [Sendy](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sendy/): Sendy is a self-hosted, single-domain email newsletter script sold for a $69 one-time fee, designed to send via Amazon SES for low per-email cost.
- [SentinelOne](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sentinelone/): AI-driven endpoint, cloud, and identity security platform unifying EDR, XDR, and autonomous threat response for enterprises.
- [Sentry](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sentry/): An error monitoring and application observability platform for identifying and fixing bugs, with performance tracing, session replay, and AI debugging.
- [Seobility](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/seobility/): Seobility is an all-in-one SEO suite for website audits, rank tracking, backlink analysis, and competitor research.
- [Sequence](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sequence/): Sequence is a CPQ, billing, and revenue recognition platform built for B2B finance teams to automate revenue operations.
- [Serendipity](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/serendipity/): Open-source PHP blogging platform with a plugin and theme ecosystem for building self-hosted blogs.
- [Seriously Simple Podcasting](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/seriously-simple-podcasting/): Free WordPress plugin by Castos for creating, managing, and publishing podcasts directly from the WordPress dashboard.
- [Serpstat](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/serpstat/): All-in-one SEO platform for keyword research, rank tracking, backlink analysis, site audits, and PPC competitor research.
- [ServiceNow](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/servicenow/): Enterprise cloud platform that automates IT service management, IT operations, HR, and customer service workflows with AI.
- [ServiceTitan](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/servicetitan/): Field service management software for HVAC, plumbing, and electrical trades, covering scheduling, dispatch, invoicing, and marketing.
- [Sessionize](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sessionize/): Sessionize is a cloud platform for managing conference Call for Papers, speaker submissions, and schedule building.
- [Setmore](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/setmore/): Setmore is an online appointment scheduling platform with branded booking pages, calendar sync, payments, and automated reminders.
- [SevenRooms](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sevenrooms/): Hospitality platform for reservations, guest CRM, and marketing automation, now owned by DoorDash.
- [Shaarli](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/shaarli/): Minimalist, self-hosted bookmark manager and link-sharing service that stores links in files with no database required.
- [Shaper](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/shaper/): Open-source, SQL-first BI tool powered by DuckDB for building dashboards, PDF reports, and embedded analytics.
- [ShareFile](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sharefile/): Secure file sharing, sync, and e-signature platform for client-facing professional services firms.
- [SharpCloud](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sharpcloud/): SharpCloud, part of Lumivero, is a strategic portfolio management platform connecting data sources into interactive visual decision views.
- [Shelf](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/shelf/): Open-source equipment and asset management platform for tracking gear, bookings, and custody with QR codes.
- [Shopify](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/shopify/): An all-in-one commerce platform for building online stores, accepting payments, and selling across multiple channels with built-in AI assistant Sidekick.
- [Shopware](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/shopware/): Shopware is a German ecommerce platform with a free open-source Community Edition and paid plans from around €600/month.
- [Shortcut](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/shortcut/): Shortcut is a project management platform built for software teams, combining stories, epics, and iterations with native Git integrations.
- [Shotcut](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/shotcut/): Shotcut is a free, open-source, cross-platform video editor built on FFmpeg with a multitrack timeline and GPU-accelerated filters.
- [Shots](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/shots/): Web design tool for creating device mockups, animated presets, and short videos from static designs.
- [Sift Org Chart](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sift-org-chart/): Organizational visibility platform for automated org charts, employee directories, and people search, based in Detroit.
- [SignNow](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/signnow/): Cloud-based e-signature and document workflow platform from airSlate for signing, sending, and managing legally binding documents.
- [SigNoz](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/signoz/): Open-source observability platform unifying logs, metrics, traces, and LLM observability, with a free self-hosted edition.
- [SignRequest](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/signrequest/): SignRequest is an ISO 27001-certified electronic signature platform for signing, sending, and tracking documents online.
- [SignServer](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/signserver/): Open-source, server-side signing software for code, documents, and timestamps, with a paid Enterprise edition.
- [SignWell](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/signwell/): SignWell is an electronic signature platform for sending legally binding documents for signature, with a free plan and developer API.
- [Silex](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/silex/): Free, open-source (AGPL) visual builder for static sites, maintained by the nonprofit Silex Labs.
- [SilverBullet](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/silverbullet/): SilverBullet is a free, open-source, self-hosted, browser-based Markdown note app with built-in scripting and queries.
- [Silverstripe CMS](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/silverstripe-cms/): Silverstripe CMS is a free, open-source BSD-licensed PHP CMS and framework, with 50,000+ live installations and optional paid Cloud hosting.
- [Similarweb](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/similarweb/): Digital intelligence platform estimating website and app traffic, researching keywords, and benchmarking competitors and markets.
- [Simple Analytics](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/simple-analytics/): Simple Analytics tracks website traffic without cookies or personal data, hosted entirely in the EU.
- [Simple Machines Forum](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/simple-machines-forum/): Free, open-source PHP and MySQL forum software for running a self-hosted online community.
- [Simplecast](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/simplecast/): Simplecast is an end-to-end podcast hosting platform, now operating under AdsWizz, with a 14-day free trial.
- [SimpleDMS](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/simpledms/): An open-source document management system for small businesses that organizes documents by tags and metadata instead of folders.
- [SimpleLogin](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/simplelogin/): Open-source email alias service that hides your real address behind forwarding aliases, with an option to self-host.
- [SimplePractice](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/simplepractice/): All-in-one EHR and practice management software for therapists and health and wellness pros, covering scheduling, billing, notes, and telehealth.
- [Simplified](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/simplified/): Simplified is an AI marketing platform where the Riley agent plans, creates, and publishes marketing campaigns across social channels.
- [SimplyBook.me](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/simplybook-me/): Freemium online booking and scheduling platform for small service businesses, with a customizable feature marketplace and client mobile apps.
- [Singer](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/singer/): Singer is a free, open-source specification for building Taps and Targets that extract and load data between systems.
- [SingleStore](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/singlestore/): Distributed SQL database unifying real-time transactions, analytics, and vector search in one engine.
- [Sintra AI](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sintra-ai/): Sintra AI offers 12 pre-built AI agents that automate tasks like social media, copywriting, data analysis, and customer support.
- [SIP Irrigation Control](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sip-irrigation-control/): Free, open-source DIY sprinkler and irrigation control software that runs on a Raspberry Pi.
- [SIP3](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sip3/): Real-time VoIP and RTC traffic monitoring platform with a free, open-source Community Edition for troubleshooting call quality.

- [Sirion](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sirion/): Sirion is an agentic AI CLM platform that helps enterprise legal, procurement, sales, and finance teams draft, negotiate, and manage contracts.
- [Sisense](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sisense/): AI-powered BI and embedded analytics platform for building dashboards, modeling data, and white-labeling analytics inside products.
- [SITE123](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/site123/): A free, wizard-style website builder with built-in hosting, SEO tools, and an online store option, with custom domains as a paid add-on.
- [Sitebulb](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sitebulb/): Sitebulb is a technical SEO crawler and audit tool available as a desktop app and cloud platform, flagging 300+ issues per crawl.
- [SiteGround](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/siteground/): SiteGround offers WordPress, cloud, and reseller hosting along with an AI-assisted website builder and Coderick, an AI app-building assistant.

- [Smallpdf](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/smallpdf/): Web and mobile PDF toolkit to compress, convert, merge, edit, and e-sign PDF documents online.
- [Smartlead](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/smartlead/): Smartlead is a cold email platform with AI agents, dedicated sending infrastructure, and a lead finder built to improve inbox deliverability.
- [SmartRecruiters](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/smartrecruiters/): SmartRecruiters is an AI-powered talent acquisition platform covering sourcing, ATS, scheduling, and hiring, with plans starting at $14,995.
- [Smartsheet](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/smartsheet/): Cloud-based work management platform combining spreadsheet-style grids, Gantt charts, automation, and reporting for project and portfolio management.
- [Smartsupp](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/smartsupp/): Live chat and AI chatbot platform combining a Mira AI agent with human operator handover for website and e-commerce support.
- [Smokeball](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/smokeball/): Cloud-based legal practice management software for law firms, offering automatic time tracking, document automation, and matter management.
- [Snappa](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/snappa/): Web-based graphic design tool for creating social media graphics, ads, and blog images from templates.
- [SnappyMail](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/snappymail/): SnappyMail is a free, self-hosted, lightweight webmail client forked from RainLoop for modern browsers.

- [Snipcart](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/snipcart/): Snipcart is a drop-in shopping cart and checkout platform for any website, priced at 2% per transaction with a $20/month minimum.

- [SOCi](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/soci/): SOCi is an AI marketing platform that deploys autonomous agents to manage local SEO, social, and reputation for multi-location brands.

- [SonarQube](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sonarqube/): SonarQube is an automated code review platform for code quality, security, and AI-generated code assurance across 40+ languages.

- [Sonarr](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sonarr/): Open-source PVR that automatically monitors, searches, downloads, and organizes TV series from Usenet and torrent sources.
- [Sonatype Nexus Repository](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sonatype-nexus-repository/): Cloud-native artifact repository manager that stores, secures, and distributes binaries, containers, and AI/ML models across 20+ package formats.
- [Sorted 3](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sorted-3/): A hyper-scheduling app for Mac and iOS that unifies tasks, calendar events, and notes into one timeline.

- [Spark Mail](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/spark-mail/): Spark Mail is an email client with a Smart Inbox, priority/pin tools, and an AI writing and summarization assistant.
- [Speakeasy](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/speakeasy/): Speakeasy generates SDKs and CLIs from OpenAPI specs, and offers a separate AI control plane for governing AI agent access to company systems.
- [Spectrum 2](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/spectrum-2/): Open-source, self-hosted XMPP transport/gateway that lets an XMPP server bridge conversations to other messaging networks such as IRC.
- [Speechify](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/speechify/): AI text-to-speech app that reads articles, PDFs, ebooks, and documents aloud in natural voices, with OCR scanning and voice cloning.
- [Spellbook](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/spellbook/): AI legal copilot that reviews, drafts, and compares contracts directly inside Microsoft Word.
- [Spendesk](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/spendesk/): Spendesk is a spend management platform unifying corporate cards, expenses, accounts payable, and procurement with AI automation.
- [Sphinx](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sphinx/): Sphinx is a free, open-source documentation generator that turns reStructuredText or MyST Markdown into HTML, PDF, and other formats.
- [SpiceDB](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/spicedb/): SpiceDB is an open-source, Google Zanzibar-inspired database for building fine-grained, relationship-based application permissions.

- [SPIP](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/spip/): SPIP is a free, open-source French publishing system focused on collaborative editing, multilingual sites, and ease of use.
- [Spline](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/spline/): Spline is a browser-based 3D design tool for building real-time, interactive 3D scenes with physics, materials, and code export.

- [SpotMe](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/spotme/): SpotMe is an enterprise event engagement platform, focused on life sciences and pharma, that syncs attendee data to CRM systems.
- [SpotOn](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/spoton/): All-in-one POS and payments platform for restaurants and retail, bundling hardware, online ordering, marketing, and payroll tools.
- [Spreaker](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/spreaker/): Spreaker, an iHeartMedia company, is a podcast hosting platform with a permanently free plan and ad/subscription monetization.
- [Spree Commerce](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/spree-commerce/): Spree Commerce is an open-source, headless Ruby on Rails e-commerce platform with a Next.js storefront and an optional Enterprise support tier.

- [SQD](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sqd/): SQD (formerly Subsquid) is an onchain data layer providing real-time and historical blockchain data across 225+ networks, via a free public API and (upcoming) dedicated enterprise data portals.
- [SQLMesh](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sqlmesh/): SQLMesh is an open source SQL/Python data transformation framework from Tobiko Data, with dbt-compatible pipelines and virtual environments.

- [Squidex](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/squidex/): Squidex is an open-source, API-first headless CMS built on .NET, available self-hosted or as a managed cloud service.
- [SquirrelMail](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/squirrelmail/): SquirrelMail is a long-running, free, open-source webmail client, now maintained only through occasional SVN snapshots.
- [Squirrly SEO](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/squirrly-seo/): Squirrly SEO is a WordPress plugin combining a live on-page SEO assistant with AI keyword research, schema tools, and AI answer-engine optimization.
- [SRS](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/srs/): SRS is a free, open-source real-time video server supporting RTMP, WebRTC, HLS, SRT, and MPEG-DASH streaming protocols.
- [Stable Diffusion](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/stable-diffusion/): Open-weight AI model for generating and editing images from text prompts, with hosted API and app options from Stability AI.

- [Stalwart Mail Server](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/stalwart-mail-server/): Stalwart is a Rust-native, open-source mail and collaboration server supporting JMAP, IMAP, and SMTP, with a paid Enterprise edition.

- [Statsig](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/statsig/): Statsig unifies feature flags, A/B testing, product analytics, and session replay in one platform.
- [Statusbrew](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/statusbrew/): Social media management platform for publishing, unified inbox engagement, team approvals, and analytics across multiple channels.

- [Stoat](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/stoat/): Free, open-source Discord alternative for text, voice, and video chat, with a self-hosted deployment option.
- [Stonly](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/stonly/): Stonly is a knowledge management platform that uses interactive guides and AI to power customer self-service and support agent assistance.
- [Stoplight](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/stoplight/): Stoplight is a design-first platform for building, documenting, mocking, and governing OpenAPI-based APIs, now operating under SmartBear.
- [Stormkit](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/stormkit/): Stormkit is a self-hosted deployment platform that automates Git-based CI/CD, positioned as an alternative to Vercel and Netlify.
- [Storyblok](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/storyblok/): A headless CMS with a visual, component-based editor, an API-first architecture, and a free Starter plan.
- [Storybook](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/storybook/): Storybook is a free, open-source frontend workshop for building, testing, and documenting UI components in isolation.
- [Strapi](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/strapi/): Open-source headless CMS that auto-generates REST and GraphQL APIs from customizable content types.
- [Streak](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/streak/): Streak is a Gmail-integrated CRM that lets teams manage sales pipelines, contacts, and follow-ups directly inside their inbox.
- [StreamSets](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/streamsets/): StreamSets (now IBM StreamSets) is a hybrid, multi-cloud platform for building and running streaming and batch data pipelines.
- [StreamYard](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/streamyard/): Browser-based live streaming and recording studio for multistreaming to platforms like YouTube and Facebook.
- [Strikingly](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/strikingly/): A no-code, click-to-edit website builder with built-in e-commerce, blogging, and analytics for entrepreneurs and creatives.
- [string.is](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/string-is/): Privacy-friendly, open-source online toolkit with over 50 string converters and formatters for developers.
- [Stripe](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/stripe/): A payment processing and financial infrastructure platform accepting payments across 195 countries, priced per-transaction with no setup or monthly base fees.
- [StrongDM](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/strongdm/): Zero Trust Privileged Access Management platform providing runtime access control and session visibility across infrastructure and cloud resources.
- [Stump](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/stump/): Free, open-source, self-hosted comics, manga, and digital book server with OPDS support, built with Rust and React.
- [Stytch](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/stytch/): Stytch is an identity platform providing authentication, authorization, and fraud prevention APIs for humans and AI agents.
- [Subskribe](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/subskribe/): Subskribe is a Quote-to-Revenue platform combining CPQ, subscription billing, and revenue recognition for SaaS companies.
- [Subskribe CPQ](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/subskribe-cpq/): Subskribe CPQ is a quote-to-revenue platform combining CPQ, subscription billing, and revenue recognition for SaaS companies.
- [Substack](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/substack/): A free publishing platform for paid newsletters, podcasts, and video, where writers keep 90% of subscription revenue.
- [Sudowrite](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sudowrite/): AI writing assistant built for novelists, offering a Story Bible, brainstorming, and rewriting tools to help fiction writers draft faster.
- [SugarCRM](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sugarcrm/): SugarCRM is a customizable CRM platform for sales, marketing, and customer service, with built-in AI insights for mid-market and enterprise teams.
- [SuiteCRM](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/suitecrm/): SuiteCRM is a free, open-source CRM for sales, marketing, and customer service, with optional paid hosting and support.
- [Suno](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/suno/): AI music generator that turns text prompts into full songs with vocals, lyrics, and instrumentals.
- [Sunsama](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sunsama/): Sunsama is a daily planner that combines task management, calendar timeboxing, and an end-of-day shutdown ritual for professionals.
- [Sunshine](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sunshine/): Free, open-source, self-hosted game streaming server that pairs with Moonlight clients to stream your PC's games.
- [Supabase](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/supabase/): Open-source Firebase alternative: managed Postgres database, auth, storage, edge functions, realtime, and vector search in one platform.
- [Super Productivity](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/super-productivity/): Super Productivity is a free, open-source to-do list and time-tracking app with Pomodoro and task-integration features.
- [SuperAnnotate](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/superannotate/): SuperAnnotate is an enterprise data annotation and AI evaluation platform combining human expert labeling with AI training workflows.
- [Supercast](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/supercast/): Podcast subscription platform charging a flat $0.59 per-subscriber monthly fee, used by shows like Huberman Lab and This American Life.
- [Superdesk](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/superdesk/): Superdesk is an open-source, headless newsroom management system for creating, curating, and publishing news content.
- [Superhuman](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/superhuman/): Superhuman is a productivity suite—Mail, Docs, and the AI assistant Go—built for fast email and AI-assisted writing and workflows, now part of Grammarly.
- [Superlist](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/superlist/): Task manager and to-do list app from the Wunderlist team, combining lists, notes, and AI-assisted planning.
- [Supermetrics](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/supermetrics/): Marketing data connector platform that automates reporting from 150+ ad, analytics, and sales sources into your BI tools and warehouses.
- [Superset](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/superset/): Free, Apache-licensed open-source platform for data exploration, SQL querying, and building BI dashboards.
- [SuperTokens](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/supertokens/): Open-source authentication platform, free under 5,000 monthly active users, with usage-based pricing for premium add-ons.
- [SupportBee](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/supportbee/): Email-based ticketing system that turns customer emails into a shared team inbox for tracking and resolving support tickets.
- [SuprSend](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/suprsend/): SuprSend is a notification infrastructure API for building email, SMS, push, WhatsApp, Slack, and in-app notification workflows from one platform.
- [Surfer](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/surfer/): Surfer is a free, open-source static file server with a web interface, CLI, WebDAV, and SFTP access, built for self-hosting on Cloudron.
- [Surfer SEO](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/surfer-seo/): AI content optimization and SEO platform that helps you write, audit, and optimize content to rank higher on Google and AI search results.
- [Surfshark](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/surfshark/): Surfshark is a budget-friendly VPN offering unlimited device connections, ad/malware blocking, and a bundled antivirus and ID protection suite.
- [Suricata](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/suricata/): Open-source network threat detection engine that runs as an IDS, IPS, and network security monitor.
- [Suroi](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/suroi/): Suroi is a free, open-source 2D battle royale game that runs entirely in the browser, inspired by surviv.io.
- [SurrealDB](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/surrealdb/): SurrealDB is a multi-model database unifying documents, graphs, vectors, time-series, and relational data with ACID transactions.
- [SurveyJS](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/surveyjs/): Open-source JavaScript UI library suite for building custom survey, form, and dashboard tools with a one-time developer license.
- [SurveyMonkey](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/surveymonkey/): A survey and feedback platform for market research and data collection, with unlimited surveys/questions and AI-assisted analysis on team plans.
- [SvelteKit](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sveltekit/): SvelteKit is a free, open-source framework for building web applications with Svelte, offering routing, SSR, and SSG.
- [Svix](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/svix/): Svix is a webhooks-as-a-service platform that sends and manages webhooks with automatic retries, monitoring, and security hardening.
- [Swapcard](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/swapcard/): AI-powered event platform for registration, matchmaking, exhibitor management, and analytics at trade shows.
- [Swetrix](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/swetrix/): Privacy-first, open-source web analytics with cookieless tracking, funnels, error tracking, and A/B testing.
- [SwingMusic](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/swingmusic/): Self-hosted, open-source music streaming server with a modern interface, described by its creators as a Spotify-like experience for your own files.
- [Syft](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/syft/): Syft is Anchore's open-source CLI and Go library for generating Software Bills of Materials from container images and filesystems.
- [Sylius](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sylius/): Sylius is an open-source, MIT-licensed headless ecommerce platform built on Symfony and PHP, based in Opole, Poland.
- [Sympa](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sympa/): Sympa is an open-source mailing list manager built for organizations running large-scale email lists.

- [Synthesia](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/synthesia/): Synthesia turns text scripts into realistic AI avatar videos in 140+ languages, no cameras, actors, or studios required.
- [Synup](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/synup/): Synup is an all-in-one operations platform for agencies to manage client acquisition, listings, reviews, and marketing.

- [Trunk.io](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/trunk-io/): Trunk.io is a CI reliability platform that detects and quarantines flaky tests to keep CI green and speed up merges, is SOC 2 compliant with SSO support, and is used by companies including Zillow,…
- [TrustArc](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/trustarc/): Enterprise privacy management platform for consent, data mapping, DSAR automation, assessments, and regulatory compliance.
- [Tryton](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/tryton/): Tryton is a 100% free and open-source, modular ERP covering accounting, sales, inventory, CRM and manufacturing.

- [Tube](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/tube/): Self-hosted, open-source YouTube-style video sharing app written in Go with automatic transcoding.

- [Tuleap](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/tuleap/): Open-source Application Lifecycle Management platform for agile planning, requirements, and testing.
- [Turso](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/turso/): SQLite-based distributed database platform that provisions per-user or per-agent databases, with vector search built in.
- [Tuwunel](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/tuwunel/): Self-hosted Matrix homeserver built for high performance, positioned as the official successor to Conduwuit.
- [Tweek](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/tweek/): A minimalist weekly planner combining a to-do list with a calendar, with free and premium tiers.
- [TweetHunter](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/tweethunter/): X (Twitter) growth platform for scheduling tweets, AI-assisted writing, and tracking audience growth analytics.
- [Twenty](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/twenty/): Twenty is an open-source CRM that lets technical teams build custom objects and no-code workflows, self-hosted for free or in the cloud from $9/user/month.
- [Twilio](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/twilio/): A communications platform (CPaaS) providing APIs for SMS, WhatsApp, voice, and RCS messaging, priced per message/call rather than flat monthly tiers.
- [Twingate](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/twingate/): Zero Trust Network Access platform that replaces traditional VPNs with identity-based, least-privilege access to private resources.
- [Twist](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/twist/): Twist is an asynchronous, threaded team messaging app by Doist built to reduce real-time chat interruptions.
- [Tyk](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/tyk/): Tyk is an independent API management platform built on an open-source gateway, supporting REST, GraphQL, gRPC, and async APIs plus AI/MCP governance.
- [Typebot](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/typebot/): Source-available, self-hostable chatbot and conversational form builder with a visual, no-code editor.
- [Typedream](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/typedream/): Typedream is a no-code website builder for creating sites, link-in-bio pages, and selling digital products like ebooks and courses.
- [Typeface](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/typeface/): Enterprise AI platform that orchestrates brand-aware marketing content and campaigns through AI agents.
- [Typeform](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/typeform/): An interactive form and survey builder for data collection, quizzes, and lead scoring, with video questions and hundreds of third-party integrations.
- [Typefully](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/typefully/): Typefully is a social media writing and scheduling tool supporting X, LinkedIn, Threads, Bluesky, Mastodon, and Instagram, with an API and AI-agent integrations.
- [Typemill](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/typemill/): Open-source flat-file CMS that turns Markdown files into websites, documentation, and eBooks without a database.
- [Typesense](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/typesense/): Open-source, typo-tolerant search engine with built-in vector and semantic search, self-hosted or via Typesense Cloud.
- [TYPO3](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/typo3/): TYPO3 is a free, open-source enterprise CMS (GPL v2) with native multi-site and multi-language support, popular across Europe.
- [Uberall](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/uberall/): Uberall is a multi-location marketing platform for managing listings, reviews, and social presence across search and AI channels.
- [Ubersuggest](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/ubersuggest/): Neil Patel's budget SEO suite for keyword research, site audits, rank tracking, and backlink analysis.
- [Ucraft](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/ucraft/): Ucraft is a drag-and-drop website and online store builder with 120+ templates and a built-in AI support assistant.
- [Udemy](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/udemy/): Udemy is a global online learning marketplace offering instructor-led video courses on tech, business, and personal development skills.
- [Udio](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/udio/): Udio is an AI music generator that turns text prompts into full songs with vocals, remixing, stems, and studio-grade editing tools.
- [UKG Pro](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/ukg-pro/): Enterprise HCM suite unifying payroll, HR, talent, and workforce management with AI-driven insights for global organizations.
- [Ultralytics](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/ultralytics/): Ultralytics develops YOLO, an open-source computer vision library, plus a cloud platform for annotation, training, and deployment.
- [Ulysses](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/ulysses/): Ulysses is a distraction-free Markdown writing app for Mac, iPad, and iPhone with project organization and direct publishing.
- [umami](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/umami/): Umami is a simple, fast, privacy-focused alternative to Google Analytics. Open source, cookie-free, and easy to use. Self-host or use Umami Cloud.
- [Umbraco](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/umbraco/): Umbraco is an open-source, MIT-licensed .NET CMS, self-hostable for free or available as managed Umbraco Cloud plans from €45/month.
- [Umbrel](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/umbrel/): Umbrel is a personal home server platform (umbrelOS) with a one-click app store for self-hosting files, media, AI models, and a Bitcoin node.
- [Unbounce](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/unbounce/): An award-winning landing page builder for marketers and agencies with drag-and-drop editing, A/B testing, and AI-powered traffic optimization.
- [Unicorn Platform](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/unicorn-platform/): Unicorn Platform is an AI-assisted no-code website builder for launching SaaS, app, directory, and startup landing pages.
- [Unison](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/unison/): Free, open-source bidirectional file synchronization tool that keeps two file replicas in sync across platforms.
- [Unlayer](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/unlayer/): Unlayer is a developer platform providing embeddable email, page, document, and popup builders with a free plan and paid usage-based tiers.
- [Unleash](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/unleash/): Unleash is an open-source feature management platform for gradual rollouts, kill switches, and A/B testing, self-hosted or via managed cloud.
- [UnrealIRCd](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/unrealircd/): A free, open-source IRC server with IRCv3 support, TLS, anti-flood/anti-spam tools, and a JSON-RPC API, in development since 1999.
- [UpCloud](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/upcloud/): UpCloud is a European cloud infrastructure provider offering cloud servers, managed Kubernetes, and databases with fixed pricing and zero-cost data transfer.
- [Upstash](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/upstash/): Serverless Redis, vector, and messaging platform billed per-request, built for edge and serverless applications.
- [Uptime Kuma](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/uptime-kuma/): Open-source, self-hosted uptime monitoring tool with status pages and 90+ notification integrations.
- [UptimeRobot](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/uptimerobot/): UptimeRobot monitors websites, APIs, and servers and alerts teams via email, SMS, Slack, and more when something goes down.
- [Uptrace](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/uptrace/): Uptrace is an OpenTelemetry-based observability platform unifying traces, metrics, and logs on a ClickHouse backend.
- [Upvote RSS](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/upvote-rss/): Open-source, self-hosted tool that generates enriched, filterable RSS feeds from Reddit, Hacker News, Lemmy, and more.
- [Upvoty](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/upvoty/): Upvoty is a feedback board and roadmap platform with AI duplicate detection and plans starting at $15/month.
- [UrBackup](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/urbackup/): Free, open-source client/server backup system combining image and file backups for fast restores.
- [UserGems](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/usergems/): Sales intelligence platform that flags buying signals like job changes and uses an AI agent (Gem-E) to score and prioritize prospects.
- [UserGuiding](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/userguiding/): UserGuiding is a no-code platform for building product tours, checklists, tooltips, and an AI support assistant to drive user onboarding and adoption.

- [UXCam](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/uxcam/): UXCam is a mobile and web product analytics platform offering session replay, heatmaps, and an AI analyst called Tara AI for user behavior insights.
- [v0](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/v0/): v0 by Vercel turns natural-language prompts into production-ready React, Tailwind, and shadcn/ui code with instant previews and one-click deployment.
- [Valkey](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/valkey/): A BSD-licensed, open-source key-value data store supported by the Linux Foundation as a permanent open-source fork.
- [Vanta](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/vanta/): Vanta is a compliance automation platform that continuously monitors security controls and streamlines audits for SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA, and other frameworks.

- [Wrike](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/wrike/): Wrike is an enterprise-grade work management platform with Gantt charts, resource management, and AI features for cross-team collaboration.
- [writefreely](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/writefreely/): Minimalist, federated, self-hosted blogging platform.
- [Writer](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/writer/): Enterprise generative AI platform combining proprietary Palmyra LLMs, a knowledge graph, and AI agents for content, marketing, and workflows.
- [WriterZen](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/writerzen/): WriterZen is an SEO content platform for keyword research, topic clustering, and GPT-4o mini-assisted writing, sold with one-time pricing.
- [Writesonic](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/writesonic/): AI writing and SEO platform that creates content and tracks brand visibility across ChatGPT, Gemini, and other AI search engines.
- [Wufoo](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/wufoo/): Wufoo is an online drag-and-drop form builder for creating registration forms, surveys, contact forms, and payment forms without code.
- [Xactly Incent](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/xactly-incent/): Xactly Incent automates sales commission design, calculation, and compliance for enterprise revenue teams.
- [Xata](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/xata/): Xata provides instant, copy-on-write Postgres database branching so teams can clone production-scale databases in seconds.
- [XBackBone](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/xbackbone/): Self-hosted file and media sharing server built for ShareX-style capture tools, with a REST API.
- [Xero](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/xero/): Cloud accounting software for small and mid-sized businesses, covering invoicing, bank reconciliation, payroll, and financial reporting.
- [Xnapper](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/xnapper/): Xnapper is a macOS app that automatically frames, backgrounds, and redacts sensitive data in screenshots before you share them.
- [XWiki](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/xwiki/): XWiki is an open-source enterprise wiki platform, free to self-host as Community edition, with paid XWiki Cloud plans for teams.
- [Yaak](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/yaak/): Yaak is a local-first, MIT-licensed desktop API client for HTTP, GraphQL, gRPC, WebSocket, and SSE requests.
- [Yakforms](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/yakforms/): Free, GPL-licensed open-source form and survey builder, the rebrand of Framaforms after five years.
- [yarn.social](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/yarn-social/): Decentralized, self-hosted microblogging ecosystem built on the plain-text twtxt protocol, with no central server or company.
- [Yepic AI](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/yepic-ai/): Yepic AI generates custom AI avatar videos and real-time, emotion-aware conversational video agents in 120+ languages.
- [Yeti-Switch](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/yeti-switch/): Open-source SIP Session Border Controller, softswitch, and real-time VoIP billing system for carrier interconnection.
- [YetiForce](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/yetiforce/): YetiForce is a free, open-source CRM/ERP system with 80+ modules for sales, marketing, support, finance and HR.
- [Yext](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/yext/): Yext is an enterprise platform for managing brand visibility, listings, and reputation across search engines and AI search.
- [Yoast SEO](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/yoast-seo/): Yoast SEO is a WordPress plugin providing real-time on-page content analysis, technical SEO automation, and AI-assisted titles and meta descriptions.
- [You.com](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/you-com/): AI search engine and assistant offering multi-model chat, deep research, and enterprise-grade web search APIs with real-time, cited answers.
- [YouCanBookMe](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/youcanbookme/): YouCanBookMe lets businesses build customizable booking pages with calendar sync, payments, and automated reminders.
- [Youform](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/youform/): Youform is a free-forever form and quiz builder with an AI form generator, conditional logic, and 6,000+ Zapier integrations.
- [YouTrack](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/youtrack/): JetBrains' project management and issue tracker, free for teams of up to 10 users.
- [youtube-dl-nas](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/youtube-dl-nas/): Open-source dashboard for downloading online videos directly to a NAS, with direct mobile-to-NAS sharing.
- [YugabyteDB](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/yugabytedb/): YugabyteDB is a distributed, PostgreSQL-compatible SQL database for cloud-native apps, available open source or as managed YugabyteDB Aeon.
- [YunoHost](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/yunohost/): YunoHost is a free, open-source, self-hosted server system for installing and managing apps with minimal expertise.
- [Zabbix](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zabbix/): Open-source enterprise observability platform for unified monitoring of networks, servers, cloud, applications, and IoT/OT devices.
- [Zammad](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zammad/): Open-source (AGPL-3.0) helpdesk platform with AI features, available self-hosted or as German-hosted cloud SaaS.
- [Zamp](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zamp/): Zamp is a managed sales tax compliance service combining software with a dedicated tax expert team for registrations, filings, and notices.
- [Zapier](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zapier/): A no-code automation platform connecting thousands of apps via Zaps, with separate product lines for workflow automation, AI agents, and chatbots.
- [Zeabur](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zeabur/): Zeabur is a DevOps platform that automates app deployment, server management, and AI model access across multiple cloud providers.
- [Zeda.io](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zeda-io/): Zeda.io is an AI-powered product discovery platform that centralizes customer feedback to generate insights and prioritize roadmaps.
- [Zeeg](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zeeg/): Zeeg is scheduling software with an AI voice agent that answers calls, qualifies leads, and books appointments alongside standard booking pages.
- [Zeek](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zeek/): Open-source network security monitoring framework that generates detailed transaction logs of network traffic.
- [Zencal](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zencal/): Zencal is a booking platform that handles scheduling, 0%-commission payments, invoicing, and reminders.
- [Zencastr](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zencastr/): All-in-one platform for recording, AI editing, hosting, and distributing podcasts and video content.
- [Zendesk](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zendesk/): An AI-driven customer service platform unifying ticketing, live chat, messaging, and voice support across channels, with AI agents on higher tiers.
- [Zendesk Sell](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zendesk-sell/): Zendesk Sell is a sales CRM for pipeline, contact, call, and email management, with built-in reporting and Zendesk Support integration.
- [Zenko CloudServer](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zenko-cloudserver/): Open-source, Amazon S3-compatible object storage server you can self-host on-premises or in Docker.
- [Zenskar](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zenskar/): AI-native revenue automation platform for billing, revenue recognition, collections, and usage metering.
- [Zero-K](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zero-k/): Zero-K is a free, open-source real-time strategy game built on the Spring engine, with physics-based unit combat.
- [Zimbra Collaboration](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zimbra-collaboration/): Email and collaboration suite with webmail, calendar, file sharing, and chat, offering a free open-source edition and paid enterprise tiers.
- [Zip](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zip/): An AI procurement platform that orchestrates intake-to-pay, sourcing, and vendor risk with governed AI agents.
- [Zipkin](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zipkin/): Open source distributed tracing system originally built at Twitter to troubleshoot latency in microservice architectures.
- [Zitadel](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zitadel/): Open-source identity infrastructure platform with hosted login, MFA, and multi-tenancy, free up to 100 daily active users.
- [ZNC](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/znc/): A free, open-source IRC bouncer that stays connected to IRC networks so any client can disconnect and reconnect without losing history.
- [Zoho Books](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zoho-books/): Cloud accounting software for invoicing, expenses, banking, and taxes, built for small businesses and integrated with the Zoho ecosystem.
- [Zoho CRM](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zoho-crm/): Cloud-based CRM with AI-powered sales automation, pipelines, and deep Zoho One integration for teams of any size.
- [Zoho Desk](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zoho-desk/): Cloud-based help desk software with AI ticketing, omnichannel support, and self-service tools for teams of every size.
- [Zoho Forms](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zoho-forms/): Zoho Forms is a no-code online form builder for creating surveys, registrations, and data-collection forms with AI assistance and workflow automation.
- [Zoho Projects](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zoho-projects/): Cloud-based project management software with task tracking, Gantt charts, time tracking, and team collaboration for businesses of all sizes.
- [Zoho Recruit](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zoho-recruit/): Cloud applicant tracking system and recruiting CRM for in-house HR teams and staffing agencies, with AI sourcing, parsing, and screening.
- [Zoho Social](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zoho-social/): Zoho Social is a social media management platform for scheduling, monitoring, and analyzing content across major social networks.
- [Zoom](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zoom/): A unified communications platform for video conferencing, team chat, and phone services across any device.
- [Zoom Phone](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zoom-phone/): Zoom Phone is a cloud VoIP business phone system with unlimited calling, AI-powered call summaries, and seamless integration with Zoom's meetings and chat.
- [ZoomInfo](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zoominfo/): ZoomInfo is a go-to-market platform providing verified B2B contact and company data, buying-intent signals, and sales/marketing automation tools.
- [ZOT OCI Registry](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zot-oci-registry/): Open-source, vendor-neutral OCI-compliant container image and artifact registry built in Go.
- [Zuddl](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zuddl/): Zuddl is a unified B2B event management platform covering ticketing, virtual/hybrid production, onsite tools, and AI agents.
- [Zulip](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zulip/): Open-source team chat app organized around topic-based threads for asynchronous team communication.
- [Zuora](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/zuora/): Enterprise subscription management and billing platform for recurring revenue, quoting, invoicing, payments, and revenue recognition.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://www.gappsy.com/sitemap.xml)
